name: Contraband Sky Rocket
description:
A rare Bandit grenade from the Collector's Edition Pack.

After throwing, it shoots forward, then sharply arcs upward. It can ricochet off walls or ceilings before bursting like a firework, spraying multiple explosive sparklers over a wide area.

It shows no listed damage because it scales with your level. Very strong early and continues to scale well. Indoors it can be lethal if the ceiling contains the blast, but rebounds can make it explode dangerously close. Outdoors it is less reliable on small targets; aiming downward, often mid-jump, helps. Excellent on large bosses.
notes:
Axton benefits strongly, especially with Gunpowder skills like Do or Die.

Damage does not scale with Overpower levels.

Cannot be traded and does not normally drop. Dropping it via a ground swap with a full inventory can cause it to despawn. To move copies between characters, put a new character's copy into Claptrap's Secret Stash, then delete that character.

Counts as a MIRV for challenges (e.g., EXPLOOOOOSIONS!) and visibly releases submunitions. It was briefly available as an event drop, and a hotfix increased its blast radius.

special.description:
Always incendiary.

Fires like a rocket: climbs, then bursts into a wide firework spray.

Damage scales with player level, not OP levels.

Warning: risky in tight spaces due to ricochets and a large blast.
special.title: WARNING: Not intended for indoor use.

abilities: Damage is based on player level.
